introSection: Snow Mountain Flying Dragon was a steel inverted roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Nanshan, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 10 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Snow Mountain Flying Dragon was a steel inverted roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Nanshan, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.



2 trains with 10 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.
